title: Message From Management
content: Message from VICE-CHANCELLOR Dear Alumni, I am very happy to note that JUIT Alumni Association has uploaded its own website. The shared experience of the management of an Institute and its alumni brings them together in a very unique way. The JUIT Alumni association as on today, consists of over 7,000 students across 20 countries, reflecting the University's global reach and influence. Our former students are making a name for themselves all around the world. The University is making significant progress, and you are its global ambassador. I congratulate you all for your achievements! The Association's main goal is to foster close ties between the University and its alumni, promote alumni involvement in university affairs, to ensure that programmes are initiated and developed for the benefit of both the alumni and the University, and to assist the University in its development and pursuit of academic excellence. There is a very little the University can do for you but you can do a lot for your alma mater. The Alumni Association can assist the members in staying connected with their friends and also with the faculty members. The members of the association are welcome to take part in different activities on the campus, to share their experiences, and to mentor the young minds on the campus. I take this opportunity to encourage the entire Alumni of the Jaypee University of Information Technology, to keep this valued association strong and steadfast, so as to help elevate the quality of our academic programmes and various other facets of our operations. This, in my opinion, will go a long way towards assuring continuous improvements to the institution – your Alma Mater – and will result into excellent service standards to our current and former student community. As the Vice-Chancellor of JUIT, it gives me great pleasure to thank you all from the core of my heart, and I eagerly anticipate your continued involvement in the coming years as we work together to reach new heights. Jai Hind!! Best Wishes Prof. (Dr.) Rajendra Kumar Sharma (VICE-CHANCELLOR) JUIT Waknaghat Message from DEAN (ACADEMICS & RESEARCH) Greetings Alumni! I warmly welcome all JUITians and JUIT Alumni. Our core mission is to engage all alumni for life. Whether you graduated a decade ago or half a year ago, the university and university’s alumni are committed to building and reaffirming the ties connecting the 10,000+ members of JUIT and the University alumni family to each other and to our alma mater. Best Wishes Prof. (Dr.) Ashok Kumar Gupta DEAN (ACADEMICS & RESEARCH) JUIT Waknaghat Message from Dean (Students Welfare) The Alumni are the backbone of any institution’s public perception as they represent the institution in more ways than one at their workplace. I am proud to be part of JUIT whose alumni are scaling greater heights in their careers. As Dean of students, I have been witness to how even senior alumni go back in time when they visit the JUIT. They want to visit the Tuck shop, their hostel room, Annapurna and relive those brief moments as a student. The Alumni Association of JUIT has taken a firm step in attempting to bond the alumni through their new website. I wish them good luck and support. Best Wishes Maj Gen Rakesh Bassi (Retd.) (Registrar & Dean of Students Welfare) JUIT Waknaghat <
